item.title: Avalyn IPO and Respiratory Drugs
item.description:
• Summary: Avalyn is planning an IPO aiming to raise approximately $182 million to fund Phase 3 trials for its reformulated respiratory drugs. The company's pipeline includes novel formulations of existing therapies for conditions like asthma and COPD, which could offer improved efficacy or tolerability. The IPO proceeds are intended to advance these programs through late-stage development and toward potential commercialization.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Endpoints News, Fierce Pharma, Fierce Biotech
